channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: NASA's Hubble captures a star-filled cluster of 500,000 stars
item.description: For the U.S. 250th anniversary, NASA released a Hubble image of Messier 3, an ancient globular cluster containing over 500,000 stars.

item.title: Quantum mechanics: from baffling theory to world-changing technology
item.description: Quantum mechanics has evolved from a controversial concept into the basis for many advanced technologies, with ongoing research expanding its impact.

item.title: NASA's Hubble captures a crimson stellar nursery sparkling with blue and white stars
item.description: Hubble has captured a spectacular view of LH 95, where about 2,500 young stars are still on their journey to becoming full-fledged stars. Scientists d...

item.title: NASA's Hubble spots a stellar sparkler for the Fourth of July
item.description: NASA's Hubble Space Telescope has captured a spectacular red, white, and blue view of one of the Milky Way's oldest star clusters to celebrate the nat...
